verbatim_quote: But we actually have some early results that when language models are trained to explain like the original target, they're actually producing explanations that are more faithful to themselves. So it seems like in these cases, it's almost easier for them to simulate itself than to try to match this original target.
gloss: [ANALOGY] But we actually have some early results that when language models are trained to explain like the original target, they're actually producing explanations that are more faithful...
